caption.text:
If you’re fearful, hold onto this❤️

For those who are new, my name is Josh and along with my dad I started @betteryouliving about 6 years ago with the sole purpose of having influence for Jesus online. 

Our mission is simple: Help you grow in your walk with God and achieve your God-given purpose. We do this through our blog, books, and content.

So far, we’ve impacted millions and have seen tens of thousands come to know Jesus. This is only the beginning, so follow to join us and grow in God❤️
